article_meta.title: Immigration Here's Where You Can Report Illegal Alien Truck Drivers Before They Kill More Americans By: Breccan F

reasoning: Solid identification of multiple genuine bias instances from the author’s prose and headline, with correct exclusion of quoted material. Minor misses of additional biased phrasings.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: All flagged items are from the author’s headline or narrative prose; no quoted or attributed statements were flagged.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Each flagged item is defensibly biased; the omission call is reasonable given the article presents no countervailing perspectives.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed additional bias in author prose such as 'English proficiency... enabling deadly crashes,' 'Those are far from the only instances,' and the sweeping 'largest wave... in American history' framing.
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are appropriate: sensational headline, spin/subjective adjectives, and an absolute causal claim as opinion-as-fact; negativity bias tag is defensible though it could also fit unsubstantiated claims.
